articles.title: Chad Johnson on fighting Adesanya & McGregor in UFC, Nightcap, CRAZY NFL career | Daniel Cormier
articles.description: In the NEWEST episode of the DC show with Daniel Cormier, we're joined by none other than sports media personality and former NFL superstar, Chad "Ochocinco" Johnson! Chad and DC get into his upbringing and how his mother and grandmother helped him realize his goal of making the NFL when it seemed improbable at times. Plus, Johnson talks about his illustrious NFL career as one of the top wide receivers in the sport with the Cincinnati Bengals, and why he has NO REGRETS over all the fines and touchdown celebrations looking back on it all. And hear some incredible stories of Chad dealing with the league when he was fined! Also, don't miss DC and Chad talk Nightcap with Shannon Sharpe and Joe Johnson, his boxing career, dreams of fighting in the UFC against Israel Adesanya and Conor McGregor, and so much more! Tickets ON SALE NOW for my Washington D.C. show LIVE the night before the White House fights! articles.title: Francis Ngannou opens up about losing son, Kobe at just 15 months | The Daniel Cormier Show
articles.description: Daniel Cormier is joined by former UFC heavyweight champion, and one of the biggest knockout artists in MMA history, Francis Ngannou. Francis opens up about his son, Kobe passing away at just 15 months old, and how he never wanted to fight again after the family tragedy. DC experienced the same tragedy as he lost his 3-month old daughter in a car accident, and the two talk about how this was the hardest thing they have had to deal with in their lives. Francis talks about finding the strength to continue fighting, and honoring his son every time he steps inside the cage. All lines provided by @hardrockbet Follow me on all social media platforms! articles.title: Carlos Prates on fighting Islam Makhachev vs. Ian Garry winner, BRUTAL TKO vs. JDM | Daniel Cormier
articles.description: Daniel Cormier IS BACK, this time with a special DC check-in interview with UFC superstar Carlos Prates! Carlos and DC go into detail on the BRUTAL knockout win vs. Jack Della Maddalena and he reveals what he told JDM when he took him down. Prates also reflects on where he stands in the division, and tells DC he will fight the winner of Ian Garry and Islam Makhachev but is also willing to be a backup fighter for that fight. Plus, get Carlos' take on which fighter he wants next, and why Islam probably thinks he's the easiest fight of any of the top contenders! articles.title: Francis Ngannou REVEALS why he LEFT UFC while being heavyweight CHAMP | The Daniel Cormier Show
articles.description: Daniel Cormier is joined by former UFC heavyweight champion, and one of the biggest knockout artists in MMA history, Francis Ngannou. Francis famously had a messy breakup with the UFC despite being the Heavyweight champ, and forced himself out of the company. He left to fight in the PFL for a massive pay day, and he talks about how leaving the UFC was one of the biggest decisions he has ever made. He also talks about how he wouldn’t completely shut the door on a UFC return, but sees it unlikely as the emotions between him and UFC president Dana White might be too much to overcome. All lines provided by @hardrockbet Follow me on all social media platforms!
